news.headline: KPN's Annual Report 2024 shows over 3% operating profit growth, record no. of fiber homes connected, in line with CSR guidelines.
news.summary: Today, KPN released its Integrated Annual Report for 2024 titled "Sustainably Connected." The report highlights that KPN successfully met its goals for 2024 and made considerable advancements towards its strategic and financial objectives for the mid-term. Noteworthy achievements include a growth in operating profit exceeding 3% and substantial strides in the sustainable digitalization of the Netherlands, reflected in a record number of fiber homes connected. Moreover, it is the first time that the Integrated Annual Report aligns with the CSRD guidelines.

news.headline: Performance in the Consumer Discretionary sector & industry, as reported by Bloomberg, is showing positive trends.
German Conservative Party wins election, aiming to form coalition government.
Kosmos Energy reports Q4 2024 results: $7M net loss, $16M adjusted loss; highlights include Zero loss.
news.summary: Dallas-based energy company, Kosmos Energy Ltd. (NYSE/LSE: KOS), revealed its financial standing for Q4 of 2024. During this period, the company recorded a net loss of $7 million, equivalent to $0.01 per diluted share. Factoring in specific items affecting result comparability, an adjusted net loss(1) of $16 million, or $0.03 per diluted share, was reported for the same quarter. Noteworthy highlights of Q4 2024 include minimal losses.

news.headline: Coreline Soft launches AI-powered lung cancer screening platform AVIEW at ECR 2025 in Vienna and Seoul, enhancing workflow and collaboration for large-scale screenings across Europe.
news.summary: Coreline Soft, a leading medical AI company, has announced the introduction of an optimized AI workflow and advanced features to enhance large-scale lung cancer screening in Europe. The company's collaboration with an optimal AI solution aims to accelerate the screening process. The launch occurred in Vienna and Seoul, South Korea on February 24, 2025. This initiative signifies an important milestone in improving early detection rates for lung cancer and optimizing screening efficiency.

news.headline: Tourism boom in Ghent prompts city’s efforts to avoid over saturation, with visitor numbers soaring.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was stated that the number of COVID-19 cases in the country have surpassed 1 million, with over 20,000 deaths recorded. The government has announced new restrictions to curb the spread of the virus, including mandatory mask-wearing in public places and limiting social gatherings to a maximum of 10 people. Healthcare officials are urging the public to adhere to these guidelines and stay vigilant in order to prevent further outbreaks. Vaccination efforts are also underway, with over 500,000 doses administered so far. The situation remains critical, and authorities are closely monitoring the situation to make further decisions as needed.

news.headline: Private Equity Firm, NB Partners, reports a buyback of [number] shares in own company.
Urbo Bankas in Lithuania recorded net profit of EUR 7.4M, loan portfolio increased by 30.6% to EUR 414.5M, assets rose 15.8% to EUR 634.8M in 2024.
news.summary: A Lithuanian capital bank, Urbo Bankas, reported a net profit of EUR 7.4 million in 2024. The bank's loan portfolio saw a notable increase of 30.6% to reach EUR 414.5 million during the same year. By the end of 2024, the bank's assets were valued at EUR 634.8 million, marking a substantial growth of 15.8% compared to the previous year when assets totaled EUR 548.1 million.

news.headline: New appointment announced at Societe Generale Group, the leading bank with total assets of $1.3 trillion.
FDA approves label changes for SUBLOCADE, reducing treatment initiation time from one week to one hour for opioid use disorder.
news.summary: A new Rapid Initiation Protocol has been introduced, cutting down the time to treat patients with SUBLOCADE® for Moderate to Severe Opioid Use Disorder (OUD) from one week to just one hour. This development, announced in Richmond, Virginia on Feb. 24, 2025, marks a major advancement in treatment. Indivior PLC (Nasdaq/LSE: INDV), a renowned global leader in the field, spearheaded this initiative.

news.headline: Raytheon (RTX) wins multi-million-dollar contract from Danish Defence Armed Forces for ELCAN Specter DR dual role sight.
news.summary: Raytheon, a business under RTX (NYSE: RTX), has secured a new multi-million-dollar contract from the Danish Defence Armed Forces to provide the ELCAN Specter DR dual role sight. This contract will enhance optical capabilities for NATO allies. The agreement was confirmed in Nuremberg, Germany on February 24, 2025.

news.headline: Realtek launched first USB-IF certified multi-port USB4 hub controller (RTS5490) with Type-C/PD. (TID: 11930)
news.summary: In Hsinchu on February 24, 2025, Realtek Semiconductor Corp introduced the world's first multi-port USB4 hub controller, dubbed RTS5490. This innovative product integrates USB Type-C/PD functionality and has been released by the Taiwan Stock Exchange-listed company (2379.TW). Realtek Semiconductor Corp is recognized as a top provider of network and multimedia ICs globally. The newly launched hub controller offers multiple ports and cutting-edge features, setting the company apart in the industry.

news.headline: Kineticos launches Kinvard Bio to develop new antibiotics against antimicrobial resistance; based on Myers Lab research.
news.summary: In Raleigh, N.C. on Feb. 24, 2025, Kineticos Life Sciences has revealed the establishment of Kinvard Bio, Inc., a new anti-infectives biotech firm. This venture is built upon pioneering research acquired through an exclusive license from the Myers Lab in the Department of Chemistry.

news.headline: Zain Bahrain wins Best-Connected Customer Experience Award at LEAP 2025 from IST Networks & Genesys.
news.summary: In Riyadh, Saudi Arabia on February 24, 2025, Zain Bahrain, a prominent telecommunications and technology company in the area, was honored with the Best-Connected Customer Experience Award at LEAP 2025 by IST Networks and Genesys. This prestigious award highlights Zain's exceptional customer experience, acknowledging their efforts in delivering outstanding connectivity services.

news.headline: Nordnet AB chooses Broadridge for shareholder disclosure, complying with Shareholder Rights Directive. Live operations begin.
news.summary: On February 24, 2025, Nordnet Bank AB, a prominent digital platform for savings and investments in the Nordic region, has started live operations in compliance with the revised Shareholder Rights Directive (SRDII). With headquarters in New York, London, and Copenhagen, Nordnet Bank AB is paving the way for improved shareholder rights. The bank's initiative is significant in the financial sector, impacting numerous investors and clients across the Nordic countries. This move underscores Nordnet Bank AB's commitment to transparency and regulatory compliance, further solidifying its position as a leading player in the industry.

news.headline: Economist warns of potential crisis as junk bond spreads remain low for over 100 days, similar to conditions before 2007 crisis.
news.summary: An economist is warning that the prolonged period of junk bond spreads remaining below 3% for over 100 days may lead to a significant market reversal. Drawing parallels to the pre-crisis conditions of May 2007, the economist suggests that this trend could trigger a spike in volatility and shatter market complacency. The macro strategist at Crescat Capital, Otavio Costa, compared the current situation to a scenario in 2007 where tight credit spreads ultimately resulted in a sharp widening. He likens tight credit spreads to tinder just waiting to catch fire, indicating potential risks ahead.

news.headline: Merz wins German election and seeks coalition.
RAY token plunges 25% amid rumors of Pump.fun testing an AMM, threatening Raydium's revenue source.
news.summary: The token of Raydium experienced a significant decline of 25% following revelations from an on-chain investigator that Pump.fun was developing a protocol capable of severing a revenue stream for the DEX.

news.headline: Hungary will not consent to rush ahead with the extension of sanctions on Russia at the EU foreign ministers meeting on Monday - Foreign Minister Szijjarto
Shoplazza debuts Smart Retail Solution at NRF 2025 to merge online and offline retail, enhancing unified commerce experience.
news.summary: On February 24, 2025, it was reported that Shoplazza took part in NRF 2025—Retail's Big Show—from January 11-14, 2025, at the Jacob K. Javits Convention Center in New York City. This event is renowned globally in the retail sector, attracting professionals and industry experts. The event was held over four days, bringing together a significant number of attendees to discuss the latest trends and innovations in the retail industry.

news.headline: EU's Foreign Minister Kallas: I will meet with US Secretary of State Rubio in the US on Tuesday.
Taiwantrade.com to showcase top Taiwanese machine tool products at TIMTOS 2025. Visit Booth S0015 on 4F of Nangang Exhibition Center.
news.summary: On February 24, 2025, in Taipei, Taiwan, the prominent B2B platform Taiwantrade.com, managed by TAITRA, will exhibit high-quality machine tool items from leading Taiwanese companies at TIMTOS 2025. This showcase will take place at Booth S0015 on the 4th floor of Nangang Exhibition Center, Hall 2 (TaiNEX 2)...

news.headline: Exosens boosts supply to Senop for night vision tubes due to rising demand for goggles, solidifying its role as a key supplier.
news.summary: Exosens has solidified its role as a primary supplier to Senop for night vision image intensifier tubes, showcasing a growing interest in night vision goggles. This partnership underscores the rise in demand for these products, reflecting the surge in orders for this critical component as more people seek enhanced night vision capabilities. The collaboration between Exosens and Senop highlights the importance of the night vision technology sector, with Exosens becoming a significant contributor by catering to this escalating need.

news.headline: OSE Immunotherapeutics presented full Phase 2 results for Lusvertikimab in Ulcerative Colitis at ECCO 20 Congress.
news.summary: OSE Immunotherapeutics recently unveiled the complete Phase 2 induction findings for the anti-IL-7R monoclonal antibody Lusvertikimab at the 20th ECCO Congress. The study focused on ulcerative colitis and showed promising results. The event marked an important milestone in the research, where significant data was presented. The findings shed light on the efficacy and potential of Lusvertikimab in treating this condition. This development signifies a crucial step forward in the field of immunotherapy, with key insights revealed. These results further solidify the position of OSE Immunotherapeutics as a prominent player in the quest for innovative treatments. The presentation showcased the impactful outcomes of the Phase 2 trial, reinforcing the importance of continued research and development in this area. Such advancements bring hope to individuals suffering from ulcerative colitis, indicating a promising future in terms of treatment options.

news.headline: Cellectis presents novel "Smart CAR T" strategy at AACR-IO 2025 to boost efficacy against solid tumors using IL-2.
news.summary: In New York on Feb. 24, 2025, Cellectis, a biotechnology company (Euronext Growth: ALCLS - NASDAQ: CLLS), presented a new approach at the AACR-IO event in Los Angeles, CA. The company, known for its gene-editing platform, aims to improve CAR T cell effectiveness against solid tumors by utilizing interleukin 2 (IL-2) pro-inflammatory properties. The event, focusing on immuno-oncology, takes place from February 23-26, 2025, showcasing Cellectis' innovative T cell engineering strategy.

news.headline: IPLOOK offers a cost-efficient evolution plan for telecom operators to transition from 2G/3G to 4G/5G seamlessly.
news.summary: In Hong Kong on February 24, 2025, amidst growing challenges for telecom operators to update old infrastructure and ensure uninterrupted services, IPLOOK offers a cost-effective plan for the transition from outdated 2G/3G systems to advanced networks. This strategy aims to bridge the gap between legacy systems and modern technologies in a structured manner to address the needs of the industry.

news.headline: Prosus intends to acquire Just Eat Takeaway for $4.3B in a cash transaction.
Russia's Ryabkov: No understanding of what Trump's peace plan on Ukraine means after Russia-US talks - RIA.
VVDN and Red Hat partner to deliver RAN Intelligent Controller solution on Red Hat OpenShift.
news.summary: VVDN Technologies, a leading global company offering software, product engineering, and electronics manufacturing services, has joined forces with Red Hat Inc., the top provider of open-source solutions worldwide. This collaboration, announced on Feb. 24, 2025, aims to implement RAN Intelligent technology.

news.headline: Prosus acquiring Just Eat Takeaway.com for €4.1Bn to create a global food delivery group, offering €20.30 per share, 49% premium.
news.summary: In Amsterdam and Johannesburg, Prosus N.V. revealed plans to acquire Just Eat Takeaway.com, with the aim of forming the fourth largest food delivery group worldwide. The acquisition will involve buying all issued share capital of Just Eat Takeaway.com for €20.30 per share through a public offer on the Amsterdam exchange, representing a significant 49% premium to the 3-month average share price. The deal is expected to solidify Prosus as a major player in the global food delivery market.

news.headline: Cabot Properties appoints Dominic Ambriano as Director, Head of Asset Management in Australia, based in Sydney.
news.summary: Sydney—Cabot Properties, a prominent investor, developer, and operator of logistics properties worldwide, recently appointed Dominic Ambriano as Director and Head of Asset Management in Australia. Ambriano, now based in Sydney, will manage asset operations within Cabot's growing Australian portfolio. His role focuses on maximizing value in the firm's properties, aligning with Cabot's integrated investment and development strategy.

news.headline: ZOOMLION partners with CTP in Hungary, investing €100m in technology for relocation to CTPark Tatabánya.
news.summary: In Amsterdam, CTP, the largest developer in Europe for industrial and logistics properties by gross lettable area, has inked a notable deal with ZOOMLION. The agreement involves a 10-year lease at CTPark Tatabánya in Hungary, constituting one of the standout transactions in the country's industrial and logistics real estate sector this year. ZOOMLION will be relocating its operations and making a significant investment of €100 million in technology within their factory as part of the arrangement. The agreement was officially signed on 20th February.

news.headline: Sandoz debuts biosimilar Pyzchiva® in the US, a new option for approximately 12 million patients seeking treatment.
Globe Telecom and Nokia join forces on network APIs to boost bank security with #MWC25; key partnership for advancement.
news.summary: Globe Telecom and Nokia have partnered to develop network APIs that will bolster security measures for banks. This collaboration, announced at Mobile World Congress 2025, aims to provide enhanced security features for financial institutions. The partnership will see the integration of innovative technologies to ensure a more secure network for banks. Stay tuned for updates on this exciting collaboration between Globe Telecom and Nokia. #MWC25.

news.headline: Frontline plc will release Q4 2024 results on Feb 28, with a webcast and conference call at 3:00 p.m. CET/9:00 a.m. EST.
news.summary: Frontline plc is set to announce its preliminary Q4 2024 results on Friday, February 28, 2025. A webcast and conference call are scheduled for 3:00 p.m. CET (9:00 a.m. ET). Interested parties can access the results presentation for download on the Investor Relations page at www.frontlineplc.cy before the conference call.

news.headline: Bloomberg starts post-German election coverage:
Funds stolen from Bybit may go through crypto mixers next. The Lazarus Group faces challenges due to high volume.
news.summary: The Lazarus Group, known for their previous tactics, may utilize mixers to hide the stolen funds. However, the large number of stolen assets could make this process more difficult for them.

news.headline: Investment group led by RRJ is reportedly nearing purchase of VistaJet's preference shares.
China 10-year government bond futures drop 0.3% to 107.930
New crypto IP surges 140%, reaching $7.11 with a billion-dollar valuation in just 10 days, aiding creators monetize IP assets.
news.summary: Last week, the cryptocurrency market faced challenges, but some lesser-known coins saw significant growth. The native token of Layer-1 blockchain Story, IP, surged by 138%, reaching a peak value of $7.11 and achieving a billion-dollar valuation just 10 days after its launch. IP is utilized for transaction fees on the blockchain project, which aids creators in registering, licensing, and monetizing their intellectual property assets. In comparison, S, the native token of the fast blockchain platform Sonic, trailed behind IP. For more information, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Tune in to Insight with Haslinda Amin on Feb 24, 2024, for the latest updates.
Egg prices soar to $4.95/dozen as 17.2M hens die from bird flu, prompting alternative food suggestions and concerns over food inflation.
news.summary: Economic commentator Noah Smith triggered discussion on food affordability, ridiculing alternatives to eggs as prices surge. Responding to Fox News' suggestions of chickpeas and bananas as egg substitutes, Smith questioned the idea amidst record-high egg prices of $4.95 per dozen in January. The spike followed a bird flu outbreak that wiped out 17.2 million hens in Nov-Dec, leading to a projected 20.3% price increase through 2025. Brian Albrecht linked the surge to supply disruption. Retailers face shortages and consumer backlash amid concerns of food inflation. (Words: 94)

news.headline: Aluminum rally loses steam as traders assess weak US economy signs.
Indegene: GenAI platform Cortex specialized for life sciences
Raydium Token drops by 22% amid Pump.Fun's rumored market maker launch, threatening its position.
news.summary: According to a source, Pump.Fun is in the process of creating its own automated market maker, potentially posing a threat to Raydium's current stronghold in the market.

news.headline: Silver One reports final drill results from Phoenix Silver Project in Arizona, with silver-copper bearing structure identified.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on February 24, 2025, Silver One Resources Inc. released findings from the 2024 diamond drill program conducted in the 417 area of its Phoenix Silver project. The company, listed on TSXV as SVE, OTCQX as SLVRF, and FSE as BRK1, shared the analytical results from the samples collected during the program.

news.headline: Trump's approach towards China may be more amicable than anticipated, according to a report by Bloomberg.
Montana is the latest state to reject Bitcoin reserve proposals, following North Dakota, Wyoming, and Pennsylvania.
news.summary: Montana has joined North Dakota, Wyoming, and Pennsylvania in rejecting proposals to include Bitcoin in state reserves. This decision comes as a significant development, considering that these four states collectively hold over $310 billion in reserves. The move highlights a growing trend among states to steer clear of incorporating the cryptocurrency into their financial reserves.

news.headline: Alujain sees financial impact from scheduled maintenance in 1Q
central bank of belgium governor : felt relatively comfortable with market expectation of 2% rates by year end give or take 50 basis points- ft
